title: trianthella
intro: Trianthella is a genus of flowering plants in the family Campanulaceae, commonly known as the trianthella or pygmy bellflower. It is a delicate, low-growing perennial with small bell-shaped flowers. Trianthella is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is used to treat various health issues such as fever, colds, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of trianthella include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
